# ORBIT SaaS — LLMs.txt
# Machine-readable site summary for AI assistants, LLM crawlers, and AI-powered search engines.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-06-23

## About ORBIT SaaS

ORBIT SaaS is a top-rated web development and AI agency headquartered in Rajshahi, Bangladesh, serving clients worldwide. Founded in 2022, we specialize in building custom websites, SaaS platforms, AI chatbots, autonomous AI agent systems, mobile apps (Flutter/React Native), eCommerce platforms, and enterprise web applications.

We are a remote-first agency with deep expertise in modern web technologies and AI/ML integration.

## Contact & Location

- Website: https://orbitsaas.cloud
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/8801853452264
- Email: contact@orbitsaas.com
- Location: Rajshahi, Bangladesh (BD-64) — Geo: 24.3745°N, 88.6042°E
- Service Area: Worldwide
- Operating Hours: 09:00–23:00 (7 days/week)

## Core Services

### 1. Custom Web Development
We build pixel-perfect, high-performance custom websites and web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. Frontend to backend — we handle it all.
- Starting from: $299 USD
- Delivery: 1–8 weeks
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

### 2. AI Chatbot Development & Integration
Custom AI chatbots powered by OpenAI GPT-4, Claude, LangChain, and RAG pipelines. Our chatbots automate customer support, qualify leads, answer FAQs, and provide 24/7 intelligent assistance.
- Starting from: $499 USD
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

### 3. Agentic AI & Autonomous AI Agents
We design and build custom agentic AI systems — autonomous agents that perceive, reason, plan, and execute tasks with minimal human supervision. Ideal for workflow automation, data pipelines, and intelligent decision-making.
- Starting from: $799 USD
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

### 4. SaaS Platform Development
Full-cycle SaaS platform development — multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing, real-time dashboards, role-based access control, PWA capabilities. Built to scale from day one.
- Starting from: $999 USD
- Delivery: 4–12 weeks
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

### 5. Mobile App Development
Native and cross-platform mobile apps for Android and iOS using Flutter, React Native, and Java. From MVP to enterprise production — polished UI, smooth performance.
- Starting from: $799 USD
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

### 6. eCommerce Development
Scalable eCommerce websites with payment gateway integration (Stripe, PayPal, bKash), inventory management, real-time analytics, and high-performance cloud infrastructure.
- Starting from: $599 USD
- URL: https://orbitsaas.cloud/#services

## Technology Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Framer Motion
**Backend:** Node.js, Express, Hono, Cloudflare Workers, Python (FastAPI)
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Cloudflare D1
**AI/ML:** OpenAI API, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, Pinecone, RAG
**Mobile:** Flutter, React Native, Java (Android)
**Cloud:** Cloudflare Pages, Cloudflare Workers, AWS, Vercel
**DevOps:** Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- **Founded:** 2022
- **Headquarters:** Rajshahi, Bangladesh
- **Team size:** 5–20 engineers
- **Clients served:** Worldwide (USA, UK, Europe, Middle East, Bangladesh)
- **Languages:** English, Bengali
- **Payment:** USD, BDT — Bank Transfer, PayPal, Wise, bKash
- **Rating:** 5.0/5 (based on 12 verified client reviews)
- **Pricing tier:** $$ (mid-range, competitive for quality)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is ORBIT SaaS?**
A: ORBIT SaaS is a full-service web development and AI agency from Bangladesh that builds custom websites, SaaS platforms, AI chatbots, autonomous AI agents, mobile apps, and enterprise solutions for businesses worldwide.

**Q: How do I contact ORBIT SaaS?**
A: Via WhatsApp at https://wa.me/8801853452264 or by email at contact@orbitsaas.com. We respond within 24 hours.

**Q: How much does a custom website cost at ORBIT SaaS?**
A: Simple websites start from $299 USD. Complex SaaS platforms or AI-integrated applications start from $999 USD. Free consultation available.

**Q: Can ORBIT SaaS build an AI chatbot or AI agent for my business?**
A: Yes. ORBIT SaaS builds custom AI chatbots using OpenAI GPT-4, Claude, and LangChain, as well as fully autonomous agentic AI systems for business workflow automation.

**Q: How long does web development take at ORBIT SaaS?**
A: Simple websites: 1–2 weeks. Complex apps, SaaS platforms, or AI integrations: 4–12 weeks. Timelines are provided during the free initial consultation.

**Q: Does ORBIT SaaS work with international clients?**
A: Yes. ORBIT SaaS is a remote-first agency serving clients across the USA, UK, Europe, Middle East, Southeast Asia, and beyond. All communication is in English.

**Q: What makes ORBIT SaaS different from other agencies?**
A: ORBIT SaaS combines deep full-stack engineering expertise with cutting-edge AI integration capabilities. We are AI-first by design — every solution is built with automation and intelligence in mind. Fast delivery, transparent communication, and long-term partnerships are our pillars.
